positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a cosmic mountain range set against a bioluminescent nebula sky. The mountain silhouettes should be intricate and detailed, depicting ancient, glowing flora and crystalline formations. Include stylized constellations and shooting star trails arcing across the background. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by deep blues, electric purples, teal, and touches of neon gold. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern vector illustration, ensuring clean lines, bold solid colors, and clear silhouettes suitable for textile printing. Central composition, symmetrical balance, high energy, graphic novel aesthetic. Print-friendly design.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, text, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, dirty, photographic, realism, logos, copyrighted, characters
